title: Non-obstructive Armor (With Mod Support)
description: Makes armor texture minimal in a way that doesn't obstruct player's skin. Has mods and trims support!
body:
# Non-obstructive Armor
This resourcepack minifies armor in a way that keeps player's skin visible. It tries to balance between armor readability and skin visibility. It supports armor from mods and armor trims!

![Non-obstructive vanilla armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DuvpTVSk/images/b89e0d5244460586a2ca0fc6b2a1d831e524e046.png)

# Mod support
Currently, this resourcepack support these mods:
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/project/LNytGWDc)
- [Create: Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/project/oWaK0Q19)
- [Create: Stuff 'N Additions](https://modrinth.com/project/aq9qUUQG)
- [Create: Misc and Things](https://modrinth.com/project/uWrs8XlB)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/project/YhmgMVyu)
- [Deep Aether](https://modrinth.com/project/gcHIih5B)
- [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) (Partially)
- [Mekanism Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-tools)
- [Copper Tools & Armor Backport](https://modrinth.com/project/J94K8VJM)
- [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/project/rxIIYO6c)
- [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
- [Unusual End](https://modrinth.com/project/WKsNOKFh)
- [[Let's Do] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/project/1DWmBJVA)
- [Aquaculture 2](https://modrinth.com/project/Vl1uNAuy)
- [Hybrid Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/project/HH4FjUqN)
- [Born in Chaos](https://modrinth.com/project/1kcHy4de)

![Support for The Aether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DuvpTVSk/images/808dfdd33680a2b24d86506123a4134c45b3ae49.png)
![Support for Create and Create: Aeronautics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DuvpTVSk/images/8edf75e5586af637a8c332d20a78c3abc1b69c59.png)
More screenshots in [The Gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/DuvpTVSk)

# Notes

<details>
<summary>Tinkers' Construct</summary>
Tinkers' Construct has a lot of materials that only used if some mod adds it in some way. In example if some mod adds electrum ingots, Tinkers' Construct will make it usable in gear tinkering.

But if you playing a mod or modpack that particularly adds its own material to Tinkers' Construct, you could need to generate armor textures for it.

```
/tconstruct generate part_textures all
```
Use this command to generate a resourcepack that features un-obstructive armor for such materials. Note that it could not work for textures that use custom generation settings or were created manually.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Mekanism</summary>
Only hazmat suit was made to be un-obstructive due to technical limitations
</details>
